en.question: Is the editor completely free?
en.answer: Yes! Circuit Diagram Maker is a free tool available directly in your browser without requiring a subscription.

en.question: Can I export my designs?
en.answer: Absolutely. You can export high-resolution PNGs and universally scalable SVGs of any circuit.

en.question: Do I need to install anything?
en.answer: No installation is required. Everything runs natively using HTML5 Canvas.
